news.title: Android 17 launches with new multitasking tools as Google expands Gemini features
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Google has released Android 17 and Wear OS 7, introducing new multitasking features, parental controls, security tools, and smartwatch upgrades. The launch is also accompanied by a Pixel Drop that brings Google’s latest AI models to its devices.

news.title: Sixty percent of US consumers say ‘AI’ in brand messaging is a turnoff, survey finds
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] WordPress VIP’s latest survey suggests consumers are wary of AI-generated answers even as companies increasingly view AI search as an important referral channel.

news.title: DOJ claims xAI’s unpermitted gas turbines are a matter of ‘national, economic, and energy security’

news.title: Robinhood’s note on 10% layoffs shows blaming AI isn’t cutting it
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Unlike many of his tech industry peers who have cut thousands of jobs citing the need to restructure to make the most of AI, Robinhood's CEO Vlad Tenev conspicuously made no mention of AI in his note about layoffs.

news.title: powered coastal safety system is helping detect dangerous rip currents in real time
news.description: [THE ECONOMIC TIMES] ISRO is leveraging artificial intelligence, satellite imagery, weather data, and ocean monitoring to detect dangerous rip currents and improve coastal safety through real-time alerts and early warning systems.
